summary: Iteration 8 testing completed successfully. All refactored backend APIs working correctly (16/16 tests passed). Frontend features verified: About page Philosophy section (Kaizen, Ikigai, Lean Six Sigma cards), Case Studies Preview, Homepage Insights section with 3 article cards, Blog page with 8 articles, Newsletter component, Admin dashboard login and stats.
passed_tests: GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns welcome message
GET /api/newsletter/count - Returns subscriber count (new endpoint)
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - Saves email to DB, returns ok:true
POST /api/newsletter/subscribe - Rejects invalid email formats
POST /api/track - Tracks page_view events
POST /api/track - Tracks form_submit events
POST /api/track - Tracks whatsapp_click events
POST /api/admin/login - Returns ok:true and token with correct password
POST /api/admin/login - Returns 401 with wrong password
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns complete stats with valid token
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns 401 without token
GET /api/admin/stats - Returns 401 with invalid token
POST /api/contact - Submits contact form successfully
POST /api/contact - Rejects invalid email format
GET /api/admin/newsletter - Returns subscriber list with valid token
GET /api/admin/newsletter - Returns 401 without token
About page /about - Philosophy section renders with Kaizen, Ikigai, Lean Six Sigma cards
About page /about - Case Studies Preview section appears
About page /about - Career milestones section renders
Homepage / - Insights section renders with 3 article cards
Blog page /blog - All 8 articles render correctly
Newsletter component on homepage - Email input and Subscribe button present
Admin dashboard /admin/analytics - Login works with password 4bund4nc142026!
Admin dashboard - Displays stats, charts, top pages, and event breakdown
seed_data_creation: TEST_ prefixed newsletter subscriptions and contact form submissions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 fully tested. Backend refactored from monolithic server.py (~450 lines) to modular routes (routes/contact.py, routes/analytics.py, routes/newsletter.py). New endpoint GET /api/newsletter/count returns active subscriber count. Philosophy section on About page has 5-language translations (EN/IT/ES/FR/DE). Insights section on homepage has expanded translations for ES/FR/DE. Exit Intent Popup uses /api/newsletter/count for social proof (displays Math.max(count, 50)+). Admin password: 4bund4nc142026!
